'''Minntaa''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-inhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] liberated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Colonel [[Jeph Shannessi]] was assassinated by the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]].
